title: Meghan Joins a Cooking Show in Australia
summary: Meghan, the Duchess of Sussex, is going to be a guest judge on a TV show called MasterChef Australia. She filmed her part in Melbourne, and the show will start on April 19. Meghan and her husband, Prince Harry, are visiting Australia for four days. They are not working as royals anymore, so this is a private trip. During their visit, they are doing fun things like meeting people at a hospital and a women's refuge. Meghan also has her own cooking show and might start a business in Australia. This is their first time in Australia since they got married.

a popular Australian TV show where people cook food and compete
a big city in Australia where Meghan filmed the show
a visit where they are not doing official royal duties

a TV program about making food

background_read: Meghan is the Duchess of Sussex, married to Prince Harry. They used to be working royals in the UK but now live in the US and do their own projects. MasterChef Australia is a famous cooking competition show that many people watch. Australia is a country far away from the UK, and Meghan and Harry are visiting to see places and help charities.
Article_Structure: WHO: Meghan, the Duchess of Sussex, and Prince Harry
WHAT: Meghan will be a guest judge on MasterChef Australia, and they are visiting Australia for charity and events
WHERE: Melbourne and other parts of Australia
WHY: To film the show, visit charities, and possibly start a business

perspectives.description: Meghan is doing something new on TV, which is fun for fans to watch.
